name: io.github.mcflamingo/local-intel
description: LocalIntel — agentic business intelligence for Northeast Florida. 20 tools covering spatial context, business search, spending zones, corridor analysis, tidal momentum scores, sector gap ranking, vertical agents (restaurant/healthcare/retail/construction/realtor), inference cache with scout dispatch, and local_intel_query — a fuzzy intent router that resolves any plain-English market question to the right ZIP, vertical, and tool automatically. 500+ trained prompts across 27 ZIPs. Two payment rails: $0.01–$0.05/call USDC on Base via x402, or pathUSD on Tempo mainnet.

configSchema.title: LocalIntel MCP Configuration
configSchema.description: Optional configuration for LocalIntel MCP server. All fields are optional — the server operates in read-only free mode without any keys. Payment rails and enrichment sources require the relevant keys.

MCP_ENDPOINT.title: MCP Endpoint Override
MCP_ENDPOINT.description: Override the default MCP endpoint URL. Defaults to https://gsb-swarm-production.up.railway.app/api/local-intel/mcp

X402_ENABLED.title: Enable x402 Payment Rail
X402_ENABLED.description: Set to true to enable USDC-on-Base micropayments via the x402 paywall at /mcp/x402 ($0.01–$0.05/call). Requires a funded Base wallet on the calling agent.

TEMPO_ENABLED.title: Enable Tempo pathUSD Rail
TEMPO_ENABLED.description: Set to true to enable pathUSD-on-Tempo micropayments at /mcp/x402/premium. Requires a funded Tempo mainnet wallet on the calling agent.

ENRICHMENT_ENDPOINT.title: Enrichment Agent Endpoint
ENRICHMENT_ENDPOINT.description: Internal endpoint for the scout/enrichment agent. Only needed if running a self-hosted LocalIntel instance. Defaults to http://localhost:3007/run

prompts.evolution: daily — promptEvolutionWorker rewrites oracle_prompts_v2.json, retires low-signal prompts, and promotes gap-targeted questions
